product_profiles.recommended_pattern: trust-led hero plus proof plus workflow clarity
product_profiles.recommended_style: precise modern editorial with restrained depth
product_profiles.recommended_palette: deep neutral base with one confident accent and strong contrast states
product_profiles.recommended_typography: authoritative grotesk headings with highly legible UI sans body
product_profiles.recommended_motion: measured motion focused on reassurance and state clarity
anti_patterns: toy-like glass cards for critical data
product_profiles.stack_recommendation: prefer current stack; add a React motion library only if transitions become state-heavy

product_profiles.recommended_pattern: hero plus product mechanism plus proof plus onboarding path
product_profiles.recommended_style: clean technical product design with strong hierarchy and controlled density
product_profiles.recommended_palette: neutral system with one bright signal accent and disciplined semantic colors
product_profiles.recommended_typography: neo-grotesk headings with practical UI sans body
product_profiles.recommended_motion: subtle reveal and interaction feedback, never decorative overload
product_profiles.stack_recommendation: HTML/CSS is enough for simple marketing surfaces; React motion is optional for richer product interactions

product_profiles.recommended_pattern: calm hero plus reassurance plus process clarity plus conversion CTA
product_profiles.recommended_style: soft premium clarity with generous whitespace and low visual aggression
product_profiles.recommended_palette: light calm neutrals with one restorative accent and high accessibility contrast
product_profiles.recommended_typography: warm humanist headings with highly readable body text
product_profiles.stack_recommendation: prefer CSS-first motion and static clarity over library-heavy animation

product_profiles.recommended_pattern: value hero plus catalog or offer proof plus friction-light CTA progression
product_profiles.recommended_palette: brand-forward palette with disciplined background and CTA contrast
product_profiles.recommended_typography: confident display heading paired with pragmatic body sans
product_profiles.recommended_motion: product-focused motion for hover, state change and merchandising emphasis
product_profiles.stack_recommendation: CSS-first for basic commerce; React motion only when merchandising interactions are materially richer

product_profiles.recommended_pattern: summary hero plus prioritized metrics plus task-oriented workflows
product_profiles.recommended_style: dense but breathable operational UI with disciplined layout rhythm
product_profiles.recommended_palette: neutral structural palette with semantic state colors and limited accent usage
product_profiles.recommended_typography: compact utilitarian sans with strong numeric clarity
product_profiles.recommended_motion: microinteraction-first motion focused on panel, state and flow changes
product_profiles.stack_recommendation: React motion can help when dashboards need coordinated transitions; otherwise keep CSS and layout discipline first

product_profiles.recommended_pattern: statement hero plus signature work plus taste proof plus contact CTA
product_profiles.recommended_style: high-personality editorial with deliberate contrast and restraint
product_profiles.recommended_palette: small but intentional palette with one memorable accent behavior
product_profiles.recommended_typography: expressive display heading with refined supporting text
product_profiles.recommended_motion: identity-supporting motion with strong reduced-motion fallback
product_profiles.stack_recommendation: React motion is justified only if the creative concept depends on coordinated animation

product_profiles.recommended_pattern: clear hero plus mechanism plus trust plus next step
product_profiles.recommended_style: clean contemporary product UI with obvious hierarchy
product_profiles.recommended_palette: neutral base with one intentional accent and semantic states
product_profiles.recommended_typography: modern sans pairing with contrast between heading and body roles
product_profiles.recommended_motion: low-to-medium motion used only to reinforce hierarchy and interaction
product_profiles.stack_recommendation: start with the current stack; only add a motion library if the interaction model truly needs it

enterprise.style_shift: increase structure, trust and contrast discipline

developer.style_shift: favor technical clarity, stronger mechanism explanation and denser information hierarchy

consumer.style_shift: favor faster comprehension, warmth and lower friction CTA rhythm

pre_delivery_checklist: hero hierarchy is obvious in the first viewport
CTA intent and visual priority are explicit
palette roles are consistent, not decorative noise
typography has contrast between heading and body roles
spacing creates rhythm instead of card clutter
mobile layout keeps meaning before decoration
accessibility_baseline: 44px minimum tap targets for mobile actions
visible focus states on interactive controls
